decision: Azure Policy assignment names are prefixed by effect — [deny|config|allowed] — followed by the requirement name.
why: Without a predictable pattern, teams can't find the right assignment without a portal lookup, and self-service breaks down.

links.note: Predictable names are what make exemptions self-service — teams can identify the correct assignment by name, no portal access required.

violations: Effect prefix outside deny, config, or allowed.
